Who I Am

Data-Driven Marketer.
Performance Obsessed.

I am a highly driven Performance Digital Marketing Strategist with over 6 years of hands-on experience engineering ROI-focused campaigns across Google Ads, Meta Ads, AdGram (Telegram), SEO, and Email Marketing Automation.

My work spans diverse industries — Banking, Fintech, Betting & Lottery, E-commerce, Restaurant & Hospitality, Marketing Agencies, and the Medical sector — giving me a rare cross-vertical perspective on customer acquisition, growth, and retention strategy.

I believe in letting numbers tell the story: 300K+ conversions, over $150,000 in ad spend managed, $0.02 cost-per-result on AdGram, 95% organic traffic growth. Every campaign I touch gets smarter, faster, and more cost-efficient.

Portfolio

Campaign Case Studies

Real campaigns. Real dashboards. Real results — from live Google Ads, Meta, and AdGram accounts. Click any screenshot to zoom in.

Google Ads · Search Campaign · Nigeria · Target CPA
High-Volume Search Campaign — 318K Clicks, 23K+ Conversions, 71.8% CTR
Managed a large-scale Nigeria Search campaign with a ₦10M+ daily budget using Target CPA bid strategy. Achieved a 95.3% optimisation score, delivering 318,043 clicks and 23,632 conversions at ₦33.86 avg. CPC. The 71.82% CTR reflects precision keyword targeting, compelling ad copy, and a meticulously structured campaign architecture that consistently outperformed industry benchmarks.
318K
Clicks
23.6K
Conversions
71.8%
CTR
📸 Google Ads — Search Campaign Nigeria | 95.3% Optimisation Score | Budget: ₦10M+/day
📸 Campaign Detail — CTR 71.82% | Avg. CPC ₦33.86 | 318K Clicks
01 — Challenge
Scale Conversions at a Sustainable CPR
Client needed maximum user acquisition in a competitive Nigerian market at sustainable cost-per-conversion, competing in a high-intent keyword landscape with aggressive rivals.
02 — Strategy
Target CPA + Precision Keyword Architecture
Implemented Target CPA bidding with sculpted keyword lists, negative keyword management, granular ad scheduling, and device bid adjustments to capture only the highest-intent traffic segments.
03 — Result
95.3% Score, 23K+ Conversions
Achieved 71.82% CTR and 23,632 conversions with a 95.3% optimisation score — significantly exceeding acquisition targets while maintaining cost efficiency across the full campaign lifecycle.
Google Ads · Performance Max · Multi-Market · $150K+ Spend
Performance Max Campaign — 27K+ Conversions @ $0.82 Cost-Per-Conversion
Executed a Performance Max campaign with full asset group optimisation, achieving 27,289 total account conversions at $0.82 cost-per-conversion. On a tight $30/day budget, the targeted asset group delivered 785 conversions at $0.64 CPA with a 12.08% conversion rate — demonstrating exceptional AI-assisted bidding mastery and creative strategy. Total account-wide spend management exceeded $150,000 across campaigns.

Google Ads · 6+ Countries · UK, Kenya, Sierra Leone, Sudan, Nigeria, Ghana
International Campaign Management — Multi-Country, 45% CTR Improvement
Simultaneously managed Google Ads campaigns across 6+ international markets — tailoring messaging, bidding strategies, and keyword targeting for local market nuances in each country. Achieved CTR improvements of up to 45% through structured A/B testing on ad creatives, copy, and bidding models. Consistently maintained strong ROAS while minimising wasted spend via refined audience segmentation per market.

Meta Ads · Facebook & Instagram · Dec 2022 – Jan 2026 · Multi-Objective
Long-Term Meta Account — 1.15M+ Impressions, 740K+ Reach, Multiple Objectives
Managed a comprehensive Meta Ads account spanning multiple ad sets across Vendor Signup Conversion, Messaging Conversion, and Reach objectives over a 3-year period (Dec 2022 – Jan 2026). Delivered 1,152,485 total impressions reaching 740,909 unique users with 6,965 clicks at an average CPM of ₦322.86 and CpR of ₦53.42. Demonstrates sustained multi-year account stewardship with audience refinement and creative testing throughout.
1.15M
Impressions
740K+
Reach
₦53.42
Avg. CpR
📸 Meta Ads Manager — Full Ad Sets Overview | 1.15M+ Impressions | 740K+ Reach | Dec 2022–Jan 2026
📸 Meta Campaign Performance — CPM ₦322.86 | CpR ₦53.42 | CTR 0.60% | Total Spend ₦372K
01 — Challenge
Multi-Objective Across 3+ Years
Needed to run simultaneous vendor acquisition, messaging conversions, and mass reach campaigns within a single Meta account while maintaining relevance and avoiding audience fatigue across years.
02 — Strategy
Segmentation & Objective Mapping
Structured distinct ad sets per objective with dedicated audience pools, creative rotation, and weekly A/B tests. Monitored CPM and frequency data closely to refresh creatives before fatigue set in.
03 — Result
1.15M Impressions at Efficient CPM
Sustained 1.15M+ impressions and 740K unique reach at CPM averaging ₦86–₦95 across reach campaigns, with vendor signup conversions delivering strong ₦53.42 average cost-per-result over the full period.
Meta Ads · Alert Group Microfinance · Fintech · 2025
Fintech App Campaign — 70% ROI Uplift & 50% Conversion Rate Improvement
At Alert Group Microfinance Bank, engineered a full-funnel Meta campaign for loan and savings products. Weekly A/B testing on creatives, copy, and audiences — combined with multi-platform orchestration across Meta, Google, UAC, and Display — delivered a 70% ROI uplift and 50% improvement in overall conversion rates. Email marketing automation further drove a 25% increase in customer engagement.

AdGram · Telegram Ads · ILOTBet · Nigeria · Kenya · Ghana
AdGram Campaign — $0.02 CpR, $10K Budget, 200K+ Conversions via Telegram
Executed high-impact AdGram (Telegram Ads) campaigns for ILOTBet's gaming user acquisition across West Africa. Achieved an industry-leading cost-per-result as low as $0.02 while managing a $10,000 monthly budget. Multiple parallel campaigns targeted distinct Telegram audience channels — with CPC ranging $0.06–$0.09 and CPM averaging $2.00–$3.00. Delivered 200,000+ conversions across Nigeria, Kenya, and Ghana through precise audience-channel matching and creative optimisation.
$0.02
Min. CpR
200K+
Conversions
$10K
Budget/Mo
📸 AdGram Campaign Dashboard — 10+ Active Campaigns | CPM $2.00–$3.00 | CPC $0.06–$0.09
📸 AdGram Campaign Detail — Impressions per Campaign: 26K–44K | CTR 2.4%–4.6%
01 — Challenge
New Channel, Tight CAC Targets in Gaming
ILOTBet needed to scale user acquisition via Telegram — a nascent ad platform in Africa — while meeting aggressive cost-per-acquisition targets across three distinct country markets with different audience behaviours.
02 — Strategy
Channel Targeting + Multi-Creative Testing
Researched and identified high-affinity Telegram channels for sports & gaming content across Nigeria, Kenya, and Ghana. Ran 10+ campaign variants simultaneously, isolating CpR-minimising creative-audience combinations.
03 — Result
$0.02 CpR — Best-in-Class Performance
200,000+ conversions at CpR as low as $0.02 — making AdGram a primary acquisition channel. $10,000 monthly budget generated outsized returns with CPM held to $2.00–$3.00, far below industry averages.
AdGram · Extended Portfolio · Multiple Campaign Waves
Sustained AdGram Scaling — 44K+ Impressions Per Campaign, $0.09 Parallel Google CpR
Extended AdGram campaign waves maintained CPC between $0.06–$0.09 with CPM averaging $2.00, achieving CTR of 2.4%–4.6% across multiple campaigns. Parallel Google Ads campaigns for the same client (ILOTBet) achieved Google CpR as low as $0.09 — creating a powerful multi-channel acquisition engine that maximised total conversion volume at minimum blended CpA.
